metadata.category_seed_recipe: int.from_bytes(sha256(b'Lera2026:' + base_name)[:8], 'big'); getrandbits(32) % 3 per pair i<j
metadata.notes: IGP (Ichoua et al. 2003) speed model: Table 1 scenario S3 (rush factor a=4.0) speeds in the Dabia-2013 five-period skeleton (rush at 20-30% and 70-80% of the original horizon, profile [mid, rush, mid, rush, mid]); categories seeded uniform symmetric, shared across the scenario triplet. Minimal TW repair: deadlines lifted to the earliest TD arrival where the raw port left customers unreachable; l_0 lifted to the worst singleton return; periods anchor to the original horizon. Solomon n=100 IGP instances live in Dabia2013.
